calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Gary Feliciano. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Arnold W. Evje appeared with plaintiff Jayesh Patel.
Plaintiff Jayesh Patel was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Jackie Wells.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 15, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 16, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on May 23, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, June 11, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jayesh Patel and against defendant Jackie Wells, as follows:

Past Due Rent - $2,220.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,280.80.
Costs - $240.00.
Total - $3,740.00

Additionally, plaintiff Jayesh Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 905 Columbus Avenue, #207, San Francisco, CA. 94133, San Francisco County.

The rental agreement is canceled.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jayesh Patel is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jackie Wells is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JUN-11-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
